stories.headline: FBI kills hostage suspect in California office building standoff
stories.body: Breaking News: The FBI killed a man suspected of holding people hostage in a California office building, ending an overnight standoff.

stories.headline: Kalshi reports George Santos to prosecutors over self-bet.
stories.body: Prediction market Kalshi has reported former Rep. George Santos to prosecutors over a bet he made on himself, a person familiar with the investigation says. https://apnews.com/article/george-santos-kalshi-2ea925949a0f3f72ec46411b41344858?taid=6a1f8775a353900001d3ca0c&utm_campaign=TrueAnthem&utm_medium=AP&utm_source=Twitter

stories.headline: Rebecca Bennett wins Democratic primary in New Jersey’s 7th District
stories.body: BREAKING: Rebecca Bennett, a former Navy helicopter pilot, has won the Democratic primary in New Jersey’s battleground 7th District.

stories.headline: Highest paid NFL receivers per year listed
stories.body: Highest paid receivers in the NFL on a per-year basis: 🏈Jaxon Smith-Njigba: $42.15M 🏈Ja’Marr Chase: $40.25M 🏈Drake London: $35.25M 🏈Justin Jefferson: $35M 🏈CeeDee Lamb: $34M

stories.headline: Victor Wembanyama joins Kobe and LeBron as only players this century to lead team in scoring entering Finals at 22 or younger
stories.body:
KOBE. LEBRON. WEMBY.

Victor Wembanyama joins Kobe Bryant in 2001 and LeBron James in 2007 as the only players this century to lead their team in scoring entering the Finals at 22 or younger 🤯

stories.headline: Inside the NBA crew to host official NBA Finals pregame, halftime and postgame show starting at 7 PM ET on ESPN
stories.body:
For the first time, the Inside the NBA crew will serve as the official NBA Finals pregame, halftime and postgame show 🍿

Coverage begins at 7 PM ET on ESPN 🏆

stories.headline: Elon Musk notes that a new Gopuff AI was built with Grok.
Elon Musk calls for the release of Derek Chauvin, citing coroner ruling on George Floyd.
stories.body:
He should be released. His penance was a miscarriage of justice. 

Coroner ruled that Floyd died of a drug overdose, not actions by Chauvin.

stories.headline: OpenAI shares video teaser for new project
FBI raids $35M Southern California mansion linked to Iran sanctions
stories.body: 🚨 JUST IN: The FBI has just RAIDED a $35 MILLION mansion in Southern California after an Iranian tech boss allegedly secretly supplied US military hardware to IRAN’S *MILITARY AND NUCLEAR PROGRAMS*

stories.headline: FBI raids $35M Newport Beach mansion over Iran tech sales
stories.body: BREAKING: Orange County tech CEO’s $35 million mansion raided by the FBI as he is arrested for selling US technology to the Iranian military.

stories.headline: Katie Porter trailing in Orange County gubernatorial primary polls
stories.body: Former Congresswoman Katie Porter (D-CA) is getting destroyed in the gubernatorial primary — even where she represented in Orange County.

stories.headline: NIH researchers charged with monkeypox smuggling conspiracy
stories.body:
"Vincent Munster and Claude Kwe, both researchers with the NIH at the Rocky Mountain Laboratory were charged today in a criminal complaint with conspiracy to smuggle monkeypox into the US and giving false statements to federal law enforcement"

https://www.justice.gov/usao-edmi/pr/feds-charge-foreign-nationals-working-national-institutes-health-smuggling-monkeypox

stories.headline: Old festival clip of spontaneous dancing turning into a crowd dance
stories.body: 16年前の音楽フェスで、1人の男が突然踊り出し笑われていた...。でも1人が加わり、次々と人が集まり、数分で大勢のダンスに変わった。
